message:
perf(pager): identity-hash PageNumber in write_set and txn_read_cache (OPT-2)

Profile showed `RandomState::hash_one::<&PageNumber>` at 1.0% self-time
on the INSERT hot path. The two hot `HashMap<PageNumber, _>` fields on
`SimpleTransaction` — `write_set` and `txn_read_cache` — hit per
INSERT and per cursor read respectively. `PageNumberBuildHasher`
(identity, already exported from fsqlite-types) bypasses SipHash-1-3
entirely — PageNumber's `Hash` impl already delegates to `write_u32`,
so the identity hasher makes lookups a single shift+mask.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
